steps.title: Move from claim to detail
steps.content: The first sentence states the broad finding: the same supernovas that formed and expanded the Local Bubble likely helped form new stars. The next sentence explains the precise mechanism involving trapped gas and dust clouds.

steps.title: Choose the detail transition
steps.content: Choice A signals a result, Choice B signals contrast, and Choice C signals concession. None fits a sentence that elaborates on the previous claim by giving the mechanism. The transition should mark a shift from general statement to specific detail. The answer is D.
